# CancelledRequestSet.IsIgnorable method

Returns `true` when a response for *requestId* SHOULD be ignored. Mirrors TS `isIgnorable`. (R-15.2.3-e)

```csharp
public bool IsIgnorable(RequestId requestId)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| requestId | The responding request id. |

## Return Value

`true` when the response should be discarded.
